silver_tables.name: silver_okta_failed_auth_by_ip_hourly
silver_tables.purpose: Time series aggregations of failed Okta authentication attempts by source IP for thresholding and rate calculations

silver_tables.name: silver_okta_failed_auth_rate_hourly
silver_tables.purpose: Hourly failed authentication rates (events per hour) used to compute rolling averages and trends

silver_tables.name: silver_okta_failed_auth_threshold_15m
silver_tables.purpose: 15-minute window aggregation used for threshold compliance calculations (≥50 failed attempts per IP)

silver_tables.name: silver_okta_account_takeover_daily
silver_tables.purpose: Canonical records of suspected account takeover events (first failure, last success, involved IPs) for daily KPIs

silver_tables.name: silver_sentinel_rule_alerts_daily
silver_tables.purpose: Daily aggregated SIEM alert counts per rule to measure alert frequency and SOC workload

silver_tables.name: silver_okta_failed_auth_trends_daily
silver_tables.purpose: Daily trends and 7-day rolling averages of failed authentication events for long-term monitoring

gold_tables.name: gold.sat4_detection_coverage_daily
gold_tables.purpose: KPI-ready SAT-4 detection coverage percentage aggregated to daily grain

gold_tables.name: gold.okta_account_takeover_metrics_daily
gold_tables.purpose: KPI-ready suspected account takeover metrics aggregated for reporting

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_okta_failed_auth_by_ip_hourly
calculation_steps: Aggregate failure events from okta.authentication_events into hourly buckets and normalize src_ip.
Compute failed_attempts and distinct_users per src_ip per hour.
Flag buckets where failed_attempts >= 50 for threshold analysis.

silver_table_suggestion.name: silver_okta_account_takeover_daily
calculation_steps: Identify suspected takeover sequences from the raw events and store canonical per-event records.
Enrich each event with user, first_failure, last_success, failure_count, and IPs.
Aggregate to daily counts and retain sample events for triage.
